div.div:
component_onboarding_details.yaml
product_context: ODH|RHOAI
component_name: odh-*
repo_url: github.com/...
repo_branch: main|rhoai-x.y
context_path: ./
dockerfile_path: Dockerfile
is_operator: true|false
# RHOAI-only:
target_rhoai_version: x.y
architectures: [x86_64, arm64]
release_category: GA|TP|Beta
long_description: ...
short_description: ...
